title: Due Date automation for Subitems
excerpt:
I see this has been floating around as a “we’ll get to it” for a couple of years now, but I’m just pitching in on this… 
The subitem automation is flawed until you can set a due date on the subitems based on the current …

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see this has been floating around as a “we’ll get to it” for a couple of years now, but I’m just pitching in on this…

The subitem automation is flawed until you can set a due date on the subitems based on the current date and/or the due date of the parent item.

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an automation set up to create multiple subitems based on the type of project being added.

Each subitem should have the same due date as the project itself. Currently, there doesn’t seem to be a way to set the due date to anything except a fixed date that is always the same date regardless of when the automation runs (which seems like a bug).

I was fine just leaving the subitem date field blank, but if you do that, the reporting tool on team member capacity no longer works, as it’s looking for due dates.

posts.author: rajaramans (Rajaraman S)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we Automations on Sub Items with a Due Date Column ? I currently see only Status Column

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rajaramans,

Can you specify the specific automation you’re interested in setting up?

posts.author: rajaramans (Rajaraman S)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want a similar automation based on Due Date for Sub Items since they are sub tasks for the main task. The Automation on Main Task works.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

We developed an app that solves this exact pain point of subitems inherting column value from parent and allows you to set sub item due dates based on its parent item date.

On creation - Populate item’s data into its subitems in a seamless way

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.31.152226×400 30.1 KB

On change - Being able to set dependency between a subitem to an item

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.30.162106×432 27.6 KB

There are also more advanced options with offset of dates -

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.36.032138×644 42.2 KB

It’s brand new (released last week) and we’re going to keep on adding new capabilities.

You can check it out here - https://monday.com/marketplace/10000287

Hope that helps!

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Setting subitems due date based on parent due date and dependency automations can be achieved with Subitems Pro Automations app. Here are a few examples:

  1. Copy parent value (due date) to subitems

    image722×277 13.7 KB

  2. Set up automatic link to parent item in each subitem and copy mirrored date to subitem date column

    image352×270 8.5 KB

    image345×265 8.08 KB

  3. Automatically set dependency between subitems

    image890×351 24.4 KB

If you have any questions or requests for custom automations, feel free to reach out to us!
